# Relay stage 2: Research
Task: followup-ui-polish-alignment-and-spacing
Working directory: /tmp/nix-shell.0TxEfP/visual-relay/wt/b355188660a3/plan-20260624121456/followup-ui-polish-alignment-and-spacing

## Task input
# UI polish: ACTIVITY title alignment, attachment row spacing, minor cleanups

Small cosmetic follow-ups surfaced while reviewing the recent UI changes
(`fix-right-panel-collapsed-state` `54cff3d`, `remove-button-sometimes-cut-off` `f7ef26e`,
`make-resizer-look-nicer` `7808033`). None are functional bugs; each is a low-risk polish item.

## 1. ACTIVITY panel title is not vertically centered
In `src/VisualRelay.App/Views/Controls/ActivityColumn.axaml`, the header was reordered so the
`panelTitle` `TextBlock` ("ACTIVITY") now sits in the same `Auto`-height row as the taller
"Reveal" button (and the toggle button), but — unlike the Queue panel's title, which sets
`VerticalAlignment="Center"` — the ACTIVITY title has no `VerticalAlignment`, so it can render
top-aligned relative to the button. **Fix:** add `VerticalAlignment="Center"` to the ACTIVITY
`panelTitle` `TextBlock` so it matches the Queue panel and aligns with the Reveal button.

## 2. Attachment path text butts against the "Reveal" button
In `src/VisualRelay.App/Views/Controls/TaskDetailPanel.axaml`, the attachment item template was
changed from a Grid (which had `ColumnSpacing="6"`) to a `DockPanel`. The `Reveal` button now has
`Margin="0,0,6,0"` (gap only on its right), so the trimmed file-path `TextBlock` (the fill child)
sits directly against the left edge of `Reveal` with no gap. **Fix:** give the `Reveal` button
`Margin="6,0,6,0"` to restore the ~6px gap between the path text and the button. (The ellipsis
already prevents overlap; this is spacing only.)

## 3. Minor cleanups (optional, low priority)
- In `ActivityColumn.axaml` (the splitter from `make-resizer-look-nicer`), the three grip dots
  (`GripDot1/2/3`) each have an identical `:pointerover` setter. Collapse them into a single
  shared `Classes`-based selector to DRY the styles (keep the visual result identical). Only do
  this if it doesn't fight the existing tests that count named borders — otherwise leave as-is.
- In `tests/VisualRelay.Tests/TaskDetailRemoveButtonLayoutTests.cs`, the assertion failure
  messages still say "Grid"/cite line numbers from before the DockPanel change; update the
  wording to reference the DockPanel so a future failure isn't misleading. (Message text only —
  do not weaken the assertions.)

## How to verify
- The "ACTIVITY" header title is vertically centered, level with the Reveal button.
- In the attachments list, there is a visible gap between a (long, ellipsized) file path and the
  Reveal button.
- Existing layout/affordance tests stay green; visual result of the splitter is unchanged.

## Constraints
- VR is general-purpose; no project-specific assumptions. Files ≤300 lines; `./visual-relay check`
  green; Conventional Commit subjects. This is cosmetic only — do not change collapse/resize
  behavior, the DockPanel structure, or the splitter's appearance/hit area.


## Manifest
(not set yet)

result.answer:
## Findings

### 1. ACTIVITY panel title alignment (`ActivityColumn.axaml`)
- **Line 41–43:** The `TextBlock` with `Classes="panelTitle"` and `Text="ACTIVITY"` sits in `Grid.Column="2"` of a `Auto,Auto,*` column grid. The row is `Auto`. There is **no `VerticalAlignment`** property set.
- **Queue panel reference** (`QueuePanel.axaml`, line 15–18): The Queue title TextBlock has `VerticalAlignment="Center"` — the ACTIVITY title should match this.
- **No code-behind** (`ActivityColumn.axaml.cs`): Just a trivial constructor; nothing touches the panelTitle.
- **File checksum:** `8a9b00b7`

### 2. Attachment path/Reveal gap (`TaskDetailPanel.axaml`)
- **Lines 267–288:** Attachment item template uses a `DockPanel`. The `Reveal` button (line 274–280) has `Margin="0,0,6,0"` — a gap only on its *right* side. The file-path `TextBlock` (the DockPanel fill child, line 281–287) sits directly against the Reveal button's left edge with **no gap**.
- **Fix:** Change Reveal button's `Margin` to `"6,0,6,0"` to add a ~6px gap on the left as well. The Remove button (line 268–273) has no Margin at all — it sits flush right of Reveal, which is fine since Reveal's right margin (6px) provides the gap before the Border padding.
- **File checksum:** `5c52f03d`

### 3a. DRY grip-dot pointerover styles (`MainWindow.axaml`)
- **Lines 145–153:** Three identical `Style` selectors for `GripDot1`, `GripDot2`, `GripDot3` — all set `Background` to `#5B9CFF` on `:pointerover`. Can be collapsed into a single `Border.gripDot` class-based selector.
- **No test references to GripDot1/2/3 by Name:** The test `Splitter_Grip_IsDotPattern_NotSolidBlock` (`ActivitySplitterAffordanceTests.cs`, lines 127–152) finds dots purely by geometry (`Bounds.Width >= 3 && Bounds.Width <= 6 && Bounds.Height >= 3 && Bounds.Height <= 6`), and checks that no element named `"Grip"` exists. It does **not** search for `GripDot1`, `GripDot2`, or `GripDot3` by name. The `SeamLine` is accessed by Name but that's unaffected.
- **So the DRY refactor is safe** — it won't break existing tests.
- **File checksum:** `3c6536bb` (MainWindow.axaml)

### 3b. Test assertion message wording (`TaskDetailRemoveButtonLayoutTests.cs`)
- **Line 123–124:** The assertion failure message says: `"increase right padding on the item template Border (line 265) from 4 to at least 10."` This references line 265 which is stale — the attachment item template now uses a DockPanel (not a Grid). The wording should be updated to say "DockPanel attachment item template Border" or similar, and drop the specific line number (or update it).
- **File checksum:** `ea1cf8b2`

### Other notes
- **`VisualRelayTheme.axaml`** (line 96–100): The `.panelTitle` style sets `FontSize="12"`, `FontWeight="SemiBold"`, `Foreground="#9AA3B1"`. No `VerticalAlignment` is set globally, so it must be set per-instance (as QueuePanel does). This confirms item 1 needs a per-instance fix.
- **`./visual-relay check`** is the verification command (line 41 of the script: `dotnet run --project .../VisualRelay.Cli.csproj -- check`).

---

```json

  "findings": "Four fix locations identified: (1) ActivityColumn.axaml line 41-43 — panelTitle TextBlock missing VerticalAlignment, fix by adding VerticalAlignment=\"Center\" to match QueuePanel pattern. (2) TaskDetailPanel.axaml line 279 — Reveal button Margin=\"0,0,6,0\" has no left gap, fix by changing to Margin=\"6,0,6,0\" to separate path text from button. (3a) MainWindow.axaml lines 145-153 — three identical GripDot1/2/3 pointerover styles can be safely collapsed into one Classes-based selector; tests only find dots by geometry (not by Name), so no test interference. (3b) TaskDetailRemoveButtonLayoutTests.cs line 124 — assertion message still says 'Border (line 265)' which is stale after Grid→DockPanel change; update wording to reference DockPanel template. All target files are ≤300 lines. No code-behind changes needed (both .axaml.cs are trivial).",

    "Item 3b: update test assertion message text only — do not weaken assertions"
  ]
}
```
